title: LeoTweaks PVP Enchantments
description: Gives all Weapons their own visual enchantment texture depending on Sharpness levels. Also includes Protection, Knockback and Fire Aspect. No Mods required.
body:
## This Resourcepack gives Weapons and Armoury their own distinction.
 **- Unique Sharpness Colours**

 **- Unique Knockback and Fire Aspect Colours**

 **- Unique Protection Colours**

Once you're familiar with the pack, you'll be able to tell what Enchantment an item has at just a glance!

_Beware that this pack may not be allowed on some PVP servers. Use it at your own risk!_

![Shows A Diamond Sword with Sharpness 5 and Fire Aspect, an Iron Axe with Sharpness 4, and a full set of Protection 4 Diamond Armour in the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfd6a4b3bbfbd4c28f216af08e286e8d414ff141.png)

Levels:
- Level **I**   💚 Green
- Level **II**  💛 Yellow
- Level **III** 🧡 Orange
- Level **IV**  💖 Red
- Level **V**   ❤️ Dark Red
- Level **VI** → **X**   🩷 Pink
- Levei **11** → **255** 💜 Purple

**Recommended to be used together with [LeoTweaks Enchantment Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-tweaks)**
